messages.content:
An electronics company wants to use a type of Cloud computing architecture that would enable them to use Microsoft Azure as a platform, while storing and retrieving data in AWS.

Which type of Cloud deployment would meet the company’s business needs?


Public Cloud


Hybrid Cloud


Private Cloud


Multi-Cloud
Hybrid Cloud

To help build credibility with a potential new client, an Accenture Sales Lead shares the story of Accenture’s own journey to the Cloud.

Which statement is true about Accenture’s own Cloud transformation journey?


Accenture has implemented our Cloud solutions at scale and delivered clear business value.


Accenture began its migration in May 2018, and now has 50% of its applications hosted on the Cloud.


Accenture expects our clients to develop their own roadmaps and strategy for Cloud solutions.


Accenture currently offers limited Cloud services and will offer full end-to-end services in the future.
Accenture has implemented our Cloud solutions at scale and delivered clear business value.

What is edge computing?


putting computing closer to the users and devices creating data


moving large amounts of data closer to the center of the Cloud


making decisions based on predetermined high-level data forecasts


using “cutting-edge“ technology to create more powerful computers
Edge computing is putting computing closer to the users and devices creating data.

Which benefit does the Cloud provide to start-up companies without access to large funding?


The ability to pay-as-you-go and create environments with little upfront cost.


The ability to indefinitely use the Cloud without cost, regardless of application traffic.


The ability to write code faster because of increased server capacity.


The ability to write code locally and run production workloads on personal laptops.
The ability to pay-as-you-go and create environments with little upfront cost.

A popular photo editing application provides customers with the option of accessing a web-based version through a monthly subscription. The vendor hosts the application and is responsible for all maintenance work including upgrades and patches.

What type of service does this option describe?


Anything as a Service (XaaS)


Platform as a Service (PaaS)


Software as a Service (SaaS)


Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS)
Software as a Service (SaaS)

How does a Cloud-first strategy differ from other approaches to Cloud?


It partners technology with multiple other disciplines for comprehensive business transformation.


It uses Artificial Intelligence to automate all business processes and completely eliminate human error.


It enables an organization to completely move to the Cloud without infrastructure or support requirements.


It keeps all the services performed by legacy systems while moving to the Cloud in a staggered approach.
A Cloud-first strategy enables an organization to completely move to the Cloud without infrastructure or support requirements.

An international fast-food chain is struggling to identify clear worldwide trends in customer preferences due to various countries’ data being in different languages.

How could a Cloud solution help the company address this problem?


by translating their menus into local languages to meet customer needs


by harmonizing data into a common language and centralized database


by implementing a translator application in every store to serve customers


by creating cuisines that are specific to each geographical location
A Cloud solution could help the company address the problem by harmonizing data into a common language and centralized database.

How does a Cloud-first strategy help clients?


by splitting the client's Cloud functions among different teams that operate independently


by moving applications, infrastructure, and data to the Cloud with speed and predictability


by altering all aspects of a business's technology, talent, and ecosystem partnerships


by putting a client's Cloud operations entirely under the control of an external team
A Cloud-first strategy helps clients by moving applications, infrastructure, and data to the Cloud with speed and predictability.

What would be an ideal scenario for using edge computing solutions?


a landscaping business that uses few or no digital devices


a backup data set posted to a public Cloud server once a month


a restaurant kitchen using real-time data to fulfill orders efficiently


a school computer lab with workstations connected to a local network
An ideal scenario for using edge computing solutions would be a restaurant kitchen that uses real-time data to fulfill orders efficiently.

An international fast-food chain is looking for opportunities to leverage the Cloud to gain insights into customer data, including location, and order patterns. The client has engaged Accenture to help create customer-focused experiences, including promotions.

They need Accenture's help with this campaign and to create a unique user experience for all their customers.

Which technology, when partnered with Cloud, would allow this to occur?


Edge Computing


Extended Reality


Blockchain


Artificial Intelligence
Artificial Intelligence

Accenture has signed a multi-year agreement to help a mobile telecom provider migrate its applications to the Cloud over a period of several years, as it seeks to implement a leaner operating model.

Which activity should Accenture execute first to provide the client with an optimal Cloud solution/landscape?


prototype new products and services


begin migrating the client’s applications


negotiate pricing with the client’s preferred Cloud provider


define a strategy and roadmap
Accenture should define a strategy and roadmap first to provide the client with an optimal Cloud solution/landscape.

Which myNav module serves as the source for sales and delivery content, assets, and intellectual property across industries?


Industry Module


Green Cloud Module


Cloud Advisor


Talent Advisor
Industry Module

Why is it important for organizations to make a strong commitment to Cloud at scale?


because higher levels of Cloud adoption lead to greater value achieved


because moving to the Cloud is a simple process that can be done easily


because organizations can transform by focusing solely on Cloud technology


because moving to the Cloud guarantees the organization's data will be secure
It is important for organizations to make a strong commitment to Cloud at scale because higher levels of Cloud adoption lead to greater value achieved.

What should businesses do in order to remain competitive under the current Cloud landscape?


use the Cloud for basic functions such as accounting and finance


dedicate all of their available discretionary budget to the Cloud


host their legacy systems on a Cloud-based infrastructure


transition the large majority of their operations to the Cloud
Businesses should transition the large majority of their operations to the Cloud in order to remain competitive under the current Cloud landscape.

What distinguishes Accenture’s Cloud capabilities from our competitors?


providing end-to-end solutioning that includes technology, innovation, and industry specialization


enabling clients to host Cloud services using their own on-premise infrastructure


offering mobile accessibility for corporate data via smartphones and other devices


allowing clients to choose the memory, location, and speed of the Cloud services that they want to use
Accenture's Cloud capabilities are distinguished from our competitors by providing end-to-end solutioning that includes technology, innovation, and industry specialization.
